query:
SELECT 
  c.contract_no,
  c.external_id,
  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS contracts_bad_debt,
  (
    SELECT CAST(SUM(CAST(pt2.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    FROM payment_transactions pt2
    INNER JOIN (
      SELECT DATE(pt3.created_at) AS latest_created_date, pt3.updated_by AS latest_updated_by
      FROM payment_transactions pt3
      WHERE pt3.contract_external_id = c.external_id
        AND pt3.section = 'Fastfone365'
      ORDER BY pt3.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ) latest ON DATE(pt2.created_at) = latest.latest_created_date AND pt2.updated_by = latest.latest_updated_by
    WHERE pt2.contract_external_id = c.external_id
      AND pt2.section = 'Fastfone365'
  ) AS debtdb_bad_debt
FROM contracts c
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
LIMIT 10;
